'''Velabri''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Velabri system/Legends|Velabri system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was [[Invasion of Velabri|conquered]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="SF" />

During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], the population was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]].<ref name="Atlas" />
